904	/-- **Coordinate formula for the degreewise object iso** (`coreIso_objIso`): its
905	`τ`-projection is the evaluated push–pull map of the backbone inclusion `backboneIncl`,
906	followed by the per-leg section identification `pushPull_leg_sections` and the open-meet
907	reindex of `coverInterOpen_inf_eq_iInf_inf`. -/
908	lemma coreIso_objIso_π (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules) (p : ℕ)
909	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (τ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀) :
910	    (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F p V).hom ≫
911	        Pi.π (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
912	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj
913	            (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ l) ⊓ V)))) τ =
914	      (sectionFunctorV V).map (pushPullMap F (backboneIncl 𝒰 p τ)) ≫
915	        (pushPull_leg_sections 𝒰 F τ V).hom ≫
916	        eqToHom (congrArg (fun W =>
917	            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op W))
918	          (coverInterOpen_inf_eq_iInf_inf 𝒰 τ V)) := by
919	  simp only [coreIso_objIso, pushPull_eval_prod_iso, Iso.trans_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom,
920	    Category.assoc, PreservesProduct.iso_hom]
921	  -- project layer by layer (term-level, defeq-robust): the open-meet reindex …
922	  refine Eq.trans (congrArg (fun w => (sectionFunctorV V).map (pushPull_sigma_iso 𝒰 F p).hom ≫
923	      piComparison (sectionFunctorV V) (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
924	        pushPullObj F (Over.mk (Scheme.Opens.ι (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ)))) ≫
925	      (Pi.mapIso (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ => pushPull_leg_sections 𝒰 F σ V)).hom ≫ w)
926	    (piMapIso_hom_π (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ => eqToIso (congrArg (fun W =>
927	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op W))
928	      (coverInterOpen_inf_eq_iInf_inf 𝒰 σ V))) τ)) ?_
929	  -- … the per-leg section identification …
930	  refine Eq.trans (congrArg (fun w => (sectionFunctorV V).map (pushPull_sigma_iso 𝒰 F p).hom ≫
931	      piComparison (sectionFunctorV V) (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
932	        pushPullObj F (Over.mk (Scheme.Opens.ι (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ)))) ≫ w)
933	    (piMapIso_hom_π_assoc (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ => pushPull_leg_sections 𝒰 F σ V) τ
934	      (eqToHom (congrArg (fun W =>
935	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op W))
936	        (coverInterOpen_inf_eq_iInf_inf 𝒰 τ V))))) ?_
937	  -- … the product comparison of the section functor …
938	  refine Eq.trans (congrArg (fun w => (sectionFunctorV V).map
939	      (pushPull_sigma_iso 𝒰 F p).hom ≫ w)
940	    (piComparison_comp_π_assoc (sectionFunctorV V) (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
941	        pushPullObj F (Over.mk (Scheme.Opens.ι (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ)))) τ
942	      ((pushPull_leg_sections 𝒰 F τ V).hom ≫ eqToHom (congrArg (fun W =>
943	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op W))
944	        (coverInterOpen_inf_eq_iInf_inf 𝒰 τ V))))) ?_
945	  -- … and the σ-leg of the product decomposition (`pushPull_sigma_iso_π`).
946	  refine Eq.trans ((Functor.map_comp_assoc _ _ _ _).symm) ?_
947	  exact congrArg (fun w => (sectionFunctorV V).map w ≫
948	      (pushPull_leg_sections 𝒰 F τ V).hom ≫
949	      eqToHom (congrArg (fun W =>
950	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op W))
951	        (coverInterOpen_inf_eq_iInf_inf 𝒰 τ V)))
952	    (pushPull_sigma_iso_π_incl 𝒰 F p τ)

954	/-- The canonical leg iso for the push–pull of an over-morphism with open-immersion
955	underlying map (replica of the Base `private pushPullCoprodLegIso`, whose proof never
956	uses the coproduct structure of its ambient scheme). -/
957	private noncomputable def pushPullLegIso {A C' : Scheme.{u}} (q : A ⟶ X)
958	    (c : C' ⟶ A) [IsOpenImmersion c] (pC : C' ⟶ X) (wC : c ≫ q = pC) (F : X.Modules) :
959	    (pushforward q).obj ((pushforward c).obj
960	        (((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj F).restrict c)) ≅
961	      pushPullObj F (Over.mk pC) :=
962	  (pushforward q).mapIso ((pushforward c).mapIso
963	    ((Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorIsoPullback c).app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj F) ≪≫
964	      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp c q).app F ≪≫
965	      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr wC).app F)) ≪≫
966	  eqToIso (congrArg (fun p' => (pushforward p').obj ((Scheme.Modules.pullback pC).obj F)) wC)
967	
968	-- The final `rfl` discharges the proof-irrelevant `eqToHom` over-triangle transports against
969	-- concrete pushforward/pullback objects, whose `whnf` exceeds the default heartbeat budget.
970	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
971	/-- Per-leg coherence (replica of the Base `private pushPull_binary_leg_coherence` for a
972	general ambient open immersion): the push–pull map of an over-morphism `Over.homMk c` is,
973	through the canonical leg iso, the pushforward of the restriction unit. -/
974	private lemma pushPull_leg_coherence {A C' : Scheme.{u}} (q : A ⟶ X)
975	    (c : C' ⟶ A) [IsOpenImmersion c] (pC : C' ⟶ X) (wC : c ≫ q = pC) (F : X.Modules) :
976	    pushPullMap F (Over.homMk c wC : Over.mk pC ⟶ Over.mk q) =
977	      (pushforward q).map
978	          ((Scheme.Modules.restrictAdjunction c).unit.app
979	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj F)) ≫
980	        (pushPullLegIso q c pC wC F).hom := by
981	  have hraw : pushPullMap F (Over.homMk c wC : Over.mk pC ⟶ Over.mk q)
982	      = rawPushPullMap c q pC wC F := rfl
983	  rw [hraw, rawPushPullMap_self_gen]
984	  have hLAU : (Scheme.Modules.restrictAdjunction c).unit.app
985	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj F) ≫
986	        (pushforward c).map
987	          ((Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorIsoPullback c).hom.app
988	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj F)) =
989	      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction c).unit.app
990	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj F) :=
991	    Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app _ _ _
992	  subst wC
993	  simp only [pushPullLegIso, Iso.trans_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom, eqToIso.hom,
994	    Iso.app_hom, Category.comp_id,
995	    Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr, eqToIso_refl, Iso.refl_hom, NatTrans.id_app]
996	  rw [← hLAU]
997	  simp only [Functor.map_comp, Category.assoc]
998	  rfl

1003	lemma pushPull_interLegHom_sections (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules)
1004	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) {p : ℕ} (σ' : Fin (p + 2) → 𝒰.I₀) (k : Fin (p + 2)) :
1005	    (sectionFunctorV V).map (pushPullMap F (interLegHom 𝒰 σ' k)) ≫
1006	        (pushPull_leg_sections 𝒰 F σ' V).hom =

1009	          (homOfLE (inf_le_inf_right V (le_iInf (fun l =>
1010	            iInf_le (fun j => coverOpen 𝒰 (σ' j))
1011	              ((SimplexCategory.δ k).toOrderHom l))))).op := by

1031	degree-`(p+1)` object iso equals the presheaf face restriction `sectionCechFaceRestr σ' k`

1035	lemma coreIso_comm_leg (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules)
1036	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) (p : ℕ) (k : Fin (p + 2)) (σ' : Fin (p + 2) → 𝒰.I₀) :
1037	    (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1038	          (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map

1043	        Pi.π (fun σ : Fin (p + 2) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
1044	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj
1045	            (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ l) ⊓ V)))) σ' =
1046	      (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F p V).hom ≫
1047	        Pi.π (fun τ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
1048	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj
1049	            (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (τ l) ⊓ V))))

1054	  -- backbone seams.  All rewrites below act on terms introduced by the seam lemmas
1055	  -- themselves, so the matching is syntactic.

1057	        ((coverCechNerveOver 𝒰).map (SimplexCategory.δ k).op)) ≫
1058	      (sectionFunctorV V).map (pushPullMap F (backboneIncl 𝒰 (p + 1) σ')) ≫
1059	      (pushPull_leg_sections 𝒰 F σ' V).hom ≫
1060	      eqToHom (congrArg (fun W =>
1061	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op W))

1086	          ((SimplexCategory.δ k).toOrderHom l)))))

1092	    (coreIso_objIso_π 𝒰 F (p + 1) V σ')) ?_

1099	      (pushPullMap F (backboneIncl 𝒰 p (σ' ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ k).toOrderHom))) ≫ w)

1103	/-- **Per-coface square of the core comparison** (`lem:coreIso_comm_coface`): for each
1104	degree `p` and coface index `k`, the object isos intertwine the individual cofaces.
1105	Coordinatewise extensionality (`Pi.hom_ext`); the `σ'`-coordinate of the left side is the
1106	face restriction by the defining `Pi.lift_π` of the section-Čech cosimplicial map, and the
1107	right side is `coreIso_comm_leg`. -/
1108	lemma coreIso_comm_coface (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules)
1109	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) (p : ℕ) (k : Fin (p + 2)) :
1110	    (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F p V).hom ≫
1111	        (sectionCechCosimplicial (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1112	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F)).δ k =
1113	      (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1114	            (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
1115	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1116	              PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1117	            ((CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)).δ k)) ≫
1118	        (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F (p + 1) V).hom := by
1119	  ext x
1120	  apply (sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1121	    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (p + 1)).injective
1122	  funext σ'
1123	  have hπ : (sectionCechCosimplicial (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1124	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F)).map (SimplexCategory.δ k) ≫
1125	        Pi.π _ σ' =
1126	      Pi.π _ (σ' ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ k).toOrderHom) ≫
1127	        sectionCechFaceRestr (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1128	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) σ' k :=
1129	    Pi.lift_π _ σ'
1130	  have hL := ConcreteCategory.congr_hom hπ (ConcreteCategory.hom (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F p V).hom x)
1131	  have hR := ConcreteCategory.congr_hom (coreIso_comm_leg 𝒰 F V p k σ') x
1132	  exact ((sectionCechProductEquiv_apply (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1133	      ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (p + 1) _ σ').trans hL).trans
1134	    (((sectionCechProductEquiv_apply (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1135	      ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (p + 1) _ σ').trans hR).symm)

1138	/-- **Alternating-sum assembly of the core comparison square** (`lem:coreIso_comm_sum`):
1139	the full alternating-coface differentials are intertwined by the object isos.  Proved
1140	ELEMENTWISE (per the iter-067 dead-end note: no `Preadditive.comp_sum` against the bundled
1141	`AddCommGrpCat`-hom `objD`): both sides, evaluated at an element and a coordinate `σ'`, are
1142	the same finite alternating sum, matched summand-by-summand by `coreIso_comm_leg`. -/
1143	lemma coreIso_comm_sum (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules)
1144	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) (p : ℕ) :
1145	    (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F p V).hom ≫
1146	        AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD
1147	          (sectionCechCosimplicial (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1148	            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F)) p =
1149	      (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1150	            (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
1151	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1152	              PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1153	            (AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD
1154	              (CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)) p)) ≫
1155	        (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F (p + 1) V).hom := by
1156	  haveI : (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1157	      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).Additive := inferInstance
1158	  haveI : (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1159	      (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).Additive :=
1160	    inferInstance

1162	  -- term-chained (`Eq.trans`/`congrArg`) — no `rw` of a `have` against the goal, dodging the
1163	  -- instance-path mismatch on the `Finset.sum` of the `Preadditive` hom group.
1164	  have hpush : ∀ x : ToType (((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj
1165	        (pushPullObj F
1166	          ((coverCechNerveOver 𝒰).obj (Opposite.op (SimplexCategory.mk p))))).presheaf.obj
1167	        (Opposite.op V)),
1168	      ConcreteCategory.hom
1169	          ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1170	              (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
1171	            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1172	                PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1173	              (AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD
1174	                (CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)) p))) x =
1175	        ∑ i : Fin (p + 2), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
1176	          ConcreteCategory.hom
1177	            ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1178	                (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
1179	              ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1180	                  PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1181	                ((CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)).δ i))) x := by
1182	    intro x

1184	          PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1185	          (AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD
1186	            (CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)) p) =
1187	        ∑ i : Fin (p + 2), (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1188	            PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1189	          ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) • (CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)).δ i) :=
1190	      Functor.map_sum _ _ _
1191	    have h2 : (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1192	          (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
1193	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1194	              PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1195	            (AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD
1196	              (CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)) p)) =
1197	        ∑ i : Fin (p + 2),
1198	          (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1199	              (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
1200	            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1201	                PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1202	              ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
1203	                (CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)).δ i)) :=
1204	      (congrArg (fun m => (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1205	          (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj
1206	            (Opposite.op V)).map m) h1).trans
1207	        (Functor.map_sum _ _ _)
1208	    refine (ConcreteCategory.congr_hom h2 x).trans ?_
1209	    rw [abHom_finsetSum_apply]
1210	    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i _ => ?_
1211	    have h3 : (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1212	          (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
1213	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1214	              PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1215	            ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
1216	              (CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)).δ i)) =
1217	        (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
1218	          (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1219	              (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
1220	            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1221	                PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
1222	              ((CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)).δ i)) :=
1223	      (congrArg (fun m => (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1224	          (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj
1225	            (Opposite.op V)).map m)

1227	    exact (ConcreteCategory.congr_hom h3 x).trans rfl

1229	  ext x
1230	  apply (sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1231	    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (p + 1)).injective
1232	  funext σ'
1233	  refine Eq.trans (sectionCech_objD_apply (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1234	    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) p
1235	    (ConcreteCategory.hom (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F p V).hom x) σ') (Eq.symm ?_)

1239	      (ConcreteCategory.hom (Pi.π (fun σ : Fin (p + 2) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
1240	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj
1241	          (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ l) ⊓ V)))) σ'))

1251	          (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ l) ⊓ V)))) σ'))

1274	set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
1275	/-- **The core comparison intertwines the Čech differentials** (`lem:coreIso_comm`).  Under the
1276	degreewise object isos `coreIso_objIso`, the alternating-coface differential of the evaluated
1277	backbone complex `(G_V ∘ Ψ) Č•(𝒰, F)` matches the alternating-coface differential of the
1278	concrete restricted section complex `Č•(𝒰', F)`.  The square is exactly the alternating-sum
1279	assembly `coreIso_comm_sum` (built from the per-coface squares `coreIso_comm_coface`, in turn
1280	from the per-leg naturality `coreIso_comm_leg`). -/
1281	lemma coreIso_comm (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules)
1282	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) (i j : ℕ) (hij : (ComplexShape.up ℕ).Rel i j) :
1283	    (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F i V).hom ≫ (sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).d i j =
1284	      (((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
1285	            (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj
1286	              (Opposite.op V)).mapHomologicalComplex (ComplexShape.up ℕ)).obj
1287	          (((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1288	              PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).mapHomologicalComplex
1289	            (ComplexShape.up ℕ)).obj (cechComplexOnX 𝒰 F))).d i j ≫
1290	        (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F j V).hom := by
1291	  obtain rfl : i + 1 = j := hij
1292	  rw [Functor.mapHomologicalComplex_obj_d, Functor.mapHomologicalComplex_obj_d]
1293	  have hsec : (sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).d i (i + 1) =
1294	      AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD
1295	        (sectionCechCosimplicial (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
1296	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F)) i :=
1297	    CochainComplex.of_d _ _ (AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.d_squared _) i
1298	  have hX : (cechComplexOnX 𝒰 F).d i (i + 1) =
1299	      AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD
1300	        (CosimplicialObject.Augmented.drop.obj (CechNerve 𝒰 F)) i :=
1301	    CochainComplex.of_d _ _ (AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.d_squared _) i
1302	  rw [hsec, hX]
1303	  exact coreIso_comm_sum 𝒰 F V i
1304	
1305	end AlgebraicGeometry

773	private lemma cechSectionHomotopyComp_coord (m : ℕ)
774	    (t : ToType ((sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).X (m + 1))) (τ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀) :
775	    sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
776	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) m
777	        (ConcreteCategory.hom (cechSectionHomotopyComp 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV m) t) τ
778	      = cechSectionPrepend 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV (m + 1) τ
779	          (sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
780	            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (m + 1) t (Fin.cons i_fix τ)) := by
781	  refine Eq.trans (sectionCechProductEquiv_apply (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
782	    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) m _ τ) ?_
783	  refine Eq.trans (ConcreteCategory.comp_apply
784	    (cechSectionHomotopyComp 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV m) (Pi.π _ τ) t).symm ?_

1025	`h_{n+2} ≫ (𝟙 - p₂₁ ≫ d)` satisfies the next one (pure preadditive algebra from `(In)`
1026	and `d ∘ d = 0`). -/
1027	private lemma cechSection_succ_step (n : ℕ)
1028	    {f : (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (n + 1) ⟶ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X n}
1029	    {g : (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (n + 2) ⟶ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (n + 1)}
1030	    (hp : 𝟙 ((cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (n + 1)) =
1031	      f ≫ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d n (n + 1) +
1032	        (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 1) (n + 2) ≫ g) :
1033	    𝟙 ((cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (n + 2)) =
1034	      g ≫ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 1) (n + 2) +
1035	        (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 2) (n + 3) ≫
1036	          (cechSectionHomotopyComp 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV (n + 1) ≫
1037	            (𝟙 ((cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (n + 2)) -
1038	              g ≫ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 1) (n + 2))) := by

1040	  have hsub : (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 1) (n + 2) =

1042	        (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 1) (n + 2) := by
1043	    have h₀ := congrArg (fun m => m ≫ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 1) (n + 2)) hp
1044	    simpa only [Category.id_comp, Preadditive.add_comp, Category.assoc,
1045	      HomologicalComplex.d_comp_d, comp_zero, zero_add] using h₀
1046	  have hd1E : (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 1) (n + 2) ≫
1047	      (𝟙 ((cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (n + 2)) -
1048	        g ≫ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).d (n + 1) (n + 2)) = 0 := by
1049	    rw [Preadditive.comp_sub, Category.comp_id, sub_eq_zero]

893	/-! ### Finite-index induction: push–pull turns a finite coproduct into a finite product
894	
895	The binary `pushPull_binary_coprod_prod` is upgraded to an arbitrary finite index `ι` by
896	`Finite.induction_empty_option`.  The chain runs through four leaves:
897	* `pushPullObjCongr` — transport a push–pull object along a slice iso;
898	* `overSigmaOptionIso` — slice lift of the `Option`-coproduct split;
899	* `piOptionIso` — the dual `Option`-product split;
900	* `pushPull_coprod_prod_empty` — the empty base case.
901	-/
902	
903	/-- Push–pull objects transport along a slice isomorphism `e : Y ≅ Y'` in `Over X`.  The
904	push–pull object is a contravariant functor of its slice argument, so the forward map is
905	`pushPullMap F e.inv` and the backward map `pushPullMap F e.hom`.  Project-local
906	(blueprint `lem:pushPullObjCongr`). -/
907	noncomputable def pushPullObjCongr (F : X.Modules) {Y Y' : Over X} (e : Y ≅ Y') :
908	    pushPullObj F Y ≅ pushPullObj F Y' where
909	  hom := pushPullMap F e.inv
910	  inv := pushPullMap F e.hom
911	  hom_inv_id := by rw [← pushPullMap_comp, e.hom_inv_id, pushPullMap_id]
912	  inv_hom_id := by rw [← pushPullMap_comp, e.inv_hom_id, pushPullMap_id]

920	    [HasCoproduct (fun o => (legs o).left)]
921	    [HasCoproduct (fun a : α => (legs (some a)).left)]
922	    [HasBinaryCoproduct (legs none).left (∐ fun a : α => (legs (some a)).left)] :
923	    Over.mk (Limits.Sigma.desc (fun o => (legs o).hom)) ≅
924	      Over.mk (Limits.coprod.desc (legs none).hom
925	        (Limits.Sigma.desc (fun a : α => (legs (some a)).hom))) :=
926	  Over.isoMk (sigmaOptionIso (fun o => (legs o).left)) (by

930	        Limits.Sigma.ι_desc_assoc, Limits.coprod.inl_desc, Limits.Sigma.ι_desc]
